allow: Bash(curl -s "https://vocarcoop.com" | grep -o 'src="[^"]*[Ll]ogo[^"]*"' | head -20; echo "---"; curl -s "https://vocarcoop.com" | grep -o '<svg[^>]*>.\\{0,2000\\}' | head -c 3000)

Bash(curl -sL "https://vocarcoop.com" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys
content = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find SVG
idx = content.find\('<svg'\)
if idx >= 0:
    print\('SVG found at:', idx\)
    print\(content[idx:idx+3000]\)
else:
    print\('No SVG found'\)
    # Look for img tags
    import re
    imgs = re.findall\(r'<img[^>]+>', content\)
    for img in imgs[:10]:
        print\(img\)
")
